title: lagerstroemia subcostata var. fauriei
intro: Lagerstroemia subcostata var. fauriei is a plant species also known as the 'Faurie's crape myrtle' or 'Fauriei crape myrtle', which belongs to the Lythraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Lagerstroemia subcostata var. fauriei is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
